ogTitle: Teddywaddy vs Teddywaddy West: Climate Safety

heading: Teddywaddy vs Teddywaddy West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Teddywaddy, Victoria and Teddywaddy West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Teddywaddy West has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Teddywaddy (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Teddywaddy or Teddywaddy West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Teddywaddy has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Teddywaddy West scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Teddywaddy scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Teddywaddy West scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Teddywaddy or Teddywaddy West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Teddywaddy West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.42% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
